Why MrMiser?

Travel is not just for the privileged

People told me my passport wasn't good enough. That I couldn't afford it. I've been proving them wrong for over a year and I'm not stopping.

🛂

Weak Passport? I got you

Every visa trick and route I share is built for Bangladeshi and South Asian passport holders. I figure out the hard parts so you don't have to start from zero.

💸

Real numbers, not guesses

No sponsored dream trips here. I show you real flights, real guesthouses and real food costs broken down in BDT so you can actually plan your trip.

🎥

Actual cinematic content

Every destination I visit gets the full Miser Films treatment. Raw, honest and beautifully shot travel films that put you right there with me.

🤝

Travel with the crew

I organize group trips from scratch with tight budgets and good people. Come travel with me and meet strangers who become friends by day two.

🗺️

Southeast Asia inside out

Thailand, Malaysia, Indonesia, Vietnam. I've done them all on almost nothing and I've documented every single detail for you to copy.

📱

A community that gets it

5800 travelers from Bangladesh, India and Australia who actually understand the struggle. This is not just a page, it's a movement.

MrMiser

Proving that a tight budget and a weak passport are no barriers between you and the whole world.

Why travel with MrMiser?

No fluff. Just real trips.

🧭

I've already been there

Every destination I organize I've done myself first. You get a guide who made the mistakes before you arrived.

💰

Actually affordable

Budget breakdowns in BDT with no hidden costs or surprise upsells. What you see is what you pay.

🛂

Passport friendly

Every trip is designed for South Asian passports. Visa process handled. Entry requirements sorted.

📹

You're in the film

Every group trip becomes a Miser Film. You'll be part of the content and honestly you might just go viral.

📍 Dhaka to the World
The person behind the passport

I'm Reyan Ahmed
aka MrMiser

Before all this I was a digital marketing professional working for big brands in Bangladesh. Good salary, comfortable life and a dream I kept putting off — to travel the entire world.

So I quit. Packed one bag. Started moving. 1.5 years later I'm still going and I'm still proving every day that a Bangladeshi passport and a tight budget are not excuses. They're just problems I figure out.

I built MrMiser to be the resource I wish I had when I started. Honest travel info for South Asian travelers who keep being told the world isn't for them. It is. Come with me.

10+
Countries
5.8K
Followers
1.5+
Years on road

What I Do

I make travel content on Instagram, YouTube and Facebook — all focused on budget travel for South Asian passport holders. Every video and post comes back to one question: can a Bangladeshi actually do this?

My marketing background means I approach content differently. Every film, post and story is built with real strategy and storytelling behind it. Not just vlogs. Actual films that happen to give you a full budget breakdown at the end.

I also run group trips for my community, planned from scratch and genuinely affordable. And the MrMiser Shop is where I put everything I know into guides and tools you can use right now.

My Goals

  • 1
    Visit every continent on a Bangladeshi passport and document every visa challenge along the way.
  • 2
    Build the go-to resource for South Asian budget travelers from their first trip to full time travel.
  • 3
    Grow MrMiser to 100K travelers who refuse to let their passport decide what they can do in life.
  • 4
    Run 10 group trips a year and give my community a safe, affordable and unforgettable way to see the world.
  • 5
    Show that cinematic travel storytelling doesn't need a big budget. Just a good eye and a real story.
Get in touch

Let's Work Together

I'm open to brand collabs, barter deals, hotel stays, travel gear partnerships and media work. My marketing background means I treat every collab as a real business relationship not just a shoutout.
